next_action: Run /gsd-resume-work to load STATE.md + handoff. Primary route is /gsd-plan-phase 02.2 --gaps to author Plan 02.2-11 with cascade-9 sub-class A/B/C scope. The fix shape is concrete from 02.2-10-VERIFICATION.md §Section 5. Alternative: /gsd-debug if any of the 3 sub-classes warrants investigation before authoring (sub-class B in particular — the AC1 envtest flake — may have a non-obvious upstream cause).
context_notes: 10-plan cascade chain in Phase 02.2 closed cascades 1-8 across diverse classes: PVC RWX/RWO, 2 binary flag defs, Makefile budget, 4 fixture harness-bugs (all same root: missing parent Project hierarchy in test fixtures), 2 Eventually timeout tightnesses, and finally the cascade-8 production-wiring-gap (Dispatcher field never assigned in cmd/manager/main.go). Cascade-8 was the architectural inflection point: the dispatch path went from gated-off to live. Two debug sessions corrected hypotheses (cascade-5 Wave Ready → resolveProject; cascade-8 backoff suppression → Dispatcher wiring gap). The 'tactical iteration over comprehensive audit' approach was validated repeatedly — no static audit pre-Phase-02.2 would have found these issues. Cwd-drift bit Plan 02.2-09's merge (recovered via SHA-cherry-pick); pre-empt check landed in Plan 02.2-10 and worked. Plan 02.2-11 should bundle cascade-9 sub-classes A/B/C and is structurally the FIRST APPROVED-eligible candidate (cascades 1-8 all closed; cascade-9 fixes are tuning, not wiring). If 02.2-11 records APPROVED, Plan 02.2-02 closeout finally fires after 10 plans of gated waiting.
